programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: The Spenglers return to the New York City firehouse where the original Ghostbusters have taken ghost-busting to the next level. When the discovery of an ancient artefact unleashes an evil force, Ghostbusters new and old must unite to save the world.

programme.title: Daliland
programme.desc: In 1973, a young gallery assistant goes on a wild adventure behind the scenes as he helps the ageing genius Salvador Dali prepare for a big show in New York.

programme.title: The Tasting
programme.desc: Jacques is divorced and runs a small wine shop, on the verge of bankruptcy. Hortense, determined not to end up single, walks into his store one day.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Hal plays a game of power and seduction with Rebecca, his dominatrix. On the verge of inheriting his father's fortune and company, he decides to end their relationship.

programme.title: The Innocent
programme.desc: Criminal hijinks and unexpected romance collide when the attempts of a son who, in trying to protect his mother, finds himself in an elaborate heist.

programme.title: Little Tornadoes
programme.desc: In 1971, Australia, a newly single father struggles to weather the turbulence of change, as a new immigrant endeavours to find her place in a foreign land.

programme.title: Relax, I'm from the Future
programme.desc: Casper, a time traveller, arrives in the present with a habit of meeting people he knows are about to die and confessing the truth about himself.

programme.title: Allelujah
programme.desc: ALLELUJAH is a warm and deeply moving story about old age. When the geriatric ward in a small Yorkshire hospital is threatened with closure, the hospital decides to fight back by galvanizing the local community: they invite a news crew to film their preparations for a concert in honor of the hospital's most distinguished nurse. What could go wrong? ALLELUJAH celebrates the spirit of the elderly patients whilst paying tribute to the deep humanity of the medical staff battling with limited resources and ever-growing demand.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: One Life
programme.desc: The incredible true story of British humanitarian Nicholas Winton, who helps save hundreds of Central European children from the Nazis on the eve of World War II.

programme.title: The Color Purple (2023)
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister Nettie and her children, Celie faces many hardships in her life, including an abusive husband simply called Mister. With the support of sultry singer Shug Avery and stand-her-ground stepdaughter Sofia, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Based on the extraordinary character at the center of Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, Wonka tells the wondrous story of how the world's greatest inventor, magician and chocolate-maker became the beloved Willy Wonka we know today. A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one delectable bite at a time - proving that the best things in life begin with a dream, and if you're lucky enough to meet Willy Wonka, anything is possible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible – Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: To track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity if falls into the wrong hands. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission - not even the lives of those he cares about most.

programme.title: The Great Escaper
programme.desc: Bernard Jordan, a World War II veteran, sneaks out of his care home to attend the 70th anniversary commemoration of the D-Day landings in Normandy.

programme.title: November
programme.desc: France. 5 days into the heart of the French anti-terrorism services hunt for suspects after the 13/11/2015 attacks in Paris. An edge-of-your-seat deep-dive into one of the most incredible manhunts in European history.

programme.title: My Neighbour Adolf
programme.desc: A lonely and grumpy Holocaust survivor convinces himself that his new neighbour is none other than Adolf Hitler. He starts an independent investigation to prove his claim.

programme.title: Maybe I Do
programme.desc: Michelle and Allen are in a relationship and decide to invite their parents to finally meet. Turns out, the parents already know one another well, which leads to some differing opinions about marriage.

programme.title: Unseen
programme.desc: Sam receives a call from Emily regarding a nearly blind woman who is running from her murderous ex in the woods. She must survive the ordeal with Sam being her eyes using video calls.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Barry uses his superpowers to travel back in time in order to change the events of the past. But when his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, Barry becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation, and there are no Super Heroes to turn to. That is unless Barry can coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imprisoned Kryptonian albeit not the one he's looking for. Ultimately, to save the world that he is in and return to the future that he knows, Barry's only hope is to race for his life. But will making the ultimate sacrifice be enough to reset the universe?

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: A Mexican-American college grad's life is turned upside down when a mysterious scarab gives him the ability to generate an exoskeleton suit of incredible power.

programme.title: Am I Ok?
programme.desc: Lucy and Jane have been best friends for most of their lives and think they know everything there is to know about each other. But when Jane announces she's moving to London, Lucy reveals a long-held secret. As Jane tries to help Lucy, their friendship is thrown into chaos.

programme.title: Apartment 7A
programme.desc: New York City, 1965. What happened in the apartment before Rosemary moved in? A struggling dancer finds herself drawn into dark forces by a peculiar couple promising her fame.

programme.title: Kill
programme.desc: India. When army commando Amrit finds out his true love Tulika is engaged against her will, he boards a New Delhi-bound train in a daring quest to derail the arranged marriage. But when a gang of knife-wielding thieves led by the ruthless Fani begin to terrorize innocent passengers on his train, Amrit takes them on himself in a death-defying kill-spree to save those around him - turning what should have been a typical commute into an adrenaline-fueled thrill ride.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Dune: Part Two will explore the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Freelance
programme.desc: An ex-special forces operative takes on a private security gig for a journalist as she interviews a ruthless dictator. When a military coup breaks out, the trio must figure out how to survive the jungle, the assassins, and each other.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: Freud invites iconic author C.S. Lewis to debate the existence of God, his unique relationship with his daughter, and Lewis' unconventional relationship with his best friend's mother.

programme.title: One Life
programme.desc: The incredible true story of British humanitarian Nicholas Winton, who helps save hundreds of Central European children from the Nazis on the eve of World War II.

programme.title: Am I Ok?
programme.desc: Lucy and Jane have been best friends for most of their lives and think they know everything there is to know about each other. But when Jane announces she's moving to London, Lucy reveals a long-held secret. As Jane tries to help Lucy, their friendship is thrown into chaos.

programme.title: Origin
programme.desc: Follows the tragedy and triumph of Pulitzer Prize winning journalist Isabel Wilkerson as she investigates a global phenomenon of epic proportions, who experiences unfathomable personal loss and love as she crosses continents and cultures to craft one of the defining American books of our time.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: Four women set out on a journey to Lourdes while confronting their pasts in search of a miracle.

programme.title: Gray Matter
programme.desc: Aurora has known all her life from her mother that the superhuman abilities they have also make them dangerous. Now, Aurora will discover if her mother was speaking the truth.

programme.title: Strange Way of Life
programme.desc: After 25 years, Silva rides a horse across the desert to visit his friend Sheriff Jake. They celebrate the meeting, but the next morning Jake tells him the reason for his trip.

programme.title: Aristotle and Dante
programme.desc: Mexican teenagers Aristotle Mendoza and Dante Quintana explore their friendship while struggling with racial and ethnic identity, sexuality and family relationships in 1987, Texas.

programme.title: Space Oddity
programme.desc: A man seeks the help from an insurance company to plan a one-way trip to Mars.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, the washed-up magician Strawn Wise, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find a mythological beast known as the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: The Last Rifleman
programme.desc: World War II veteran Artie Crawford lives in Northern Ireland. After his wife's death, he decides to set off alone to France to attend the 75th anniversary of the D-Day landings.

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: Bank of Dave
programme.desc: Based on the true-life experiences of Dave Fishwick, Bank of Dave tells the story of how a working-class Burnley man and self-made millionaire fought to set up a community bank.

programme.title: Blackberry
programme.desc: Showcases the true story of the meteoric rise and catastrophic demise of the world's first smartphone, through a ruthlessly competitive Silicon Valley.

programme.title: Tarot
programme.desc: When a group of friends recklessly violates the sacred rule of Tarot readings, they unknowingly unleash an unspeakable evil trapped within the cursed cards. One by one, they come face to face with fate and end up in a race against death.

programme.title: Drive-Away Dolls
programme.desc: Free-spirited Jamie and her demure friend, Marian, embark on a road trip to Tallahassee for a fresh start, but things go wrong when they meet inept criminals along the way.

programme.title: Abigail
programme.desc: After a group of would-be criminals kidnap the 12-year-old ballerina daughter of a powerful underworld figure, all they have to do to collect a $50 million ransom is watch the girl overnight. In an isolated mansion, the captors start to dwindle, one by one, and they discover, to their mounting horror, that they're locked inside with no normal little girl.

programme.title: Gray Matter
programme.desc: Aurora has known all her life from her mother that the superhuman abilities they have also make them dangerous. Now, Aurora will discover if her mother was speaking the truth.

programme.title: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: Via various modes of surveillance we observe a young woman, Winnie, and her disabled brother, Stevie, caught up in a web of intrigue involving a bomb plot, inept anarchists, ambitious police and a corrupt politician. The duplicity of Winnie's partner, Conrad Verloc - political activist and police informant - propels these siblings down a treacherous path, their only succour coming in the aftermath through the actions of police officer Kylie Heat.

programme.title: French Girl
programme.desc: Gordon, a high school teacher from Brooklyn, goes with his girlfriend and chef Sophie to her hometown of Quebec City, where she is testing for the Michelin 3-star restaurant of Ruby Collins.

programme.title: I.S.S.
programme.desc: Tensions flare in the near future aboard the International Space Station as a conflict breaks out on Earth. Reeling, the US and Russian astronauts receive orders from the ground - take control of the station by any means necessary.

programme.title: Oppenheimer
programme.desc: Oppenheimer thrusts audiences into the mind of physicist J. Robert Oppenheimer, whose landmark work on the Manhattan Project created the first atomic bomb.

programme.title: Immaculate
programme.desc: Cecilia, a woman of devout faith, is warmly welcomed to the picture-perfect Italian countryside where she is offered a new role at an illustrious convent. But it becomes clear to Cecilia that her new home harbors dark and horrifying secrets.

programme.title: Lisa Frankenstein
programme.desc: A misunderstood teenager and a reanimated Victorian corpse embark on a murderous journey together to find love, happiness, and a few missing body parts.

programme.title: Relax, I'm from the Future
programme.desc: Casper, a time traveller, arrives in the present with a habit of meeting people he knows are about to die and confessing the truth about himself.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: He's a stuntman, and like everyone in the stunt community, he gets blown up, shot, crashed, thrown through windows and dropped from the highest of heights, all for our entertainment. And now, fresh off an almost career-ending accident, this working-class hero has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job. What could possibly go right?

programme.title: Mean Girls (2024)
programme.desc: In a musical twist of the cult classic, new student Cady Heron is welcomed by the popular girls called "The Plastics". However, when Cady falls for queen bee Regina's ex-boyfriend, she finds herself in Regina's crosshairs. She must learn to stay true to herself while navigating the most cut throat jungle of all: high school.

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: Celebrate the life and music of an icon who inspired generations through his message of love, peace, and unity. In this powerful and uplifting film, discover Bob Marley's incredible story of overcoming adversity and the journey behind his revolutionary music that changed the world.

programme.title: Gary
programme.desc: Follows Gary Coleman's rise to international fame as the child star of Diff'rent Strokes, his struggles with fame, and the controversy surrounding his tragic death at the age of 42.

programme.title: Freelance
programme.desc: An ex-special forces operative takes on a private security gig for a journalist as she interviews a ruthless dictator. When a military coup breaks out, the trio must figure out how to survive the jungle, the assassins, and each other.

programme.title: Bank of Dave
programme.desc: Based on the true-life experiences of Dave Fishwick, Bank of Dave tells the story of how a working-class Burnley man and self-made millionaire fought to set up a community bank.

programme.title: The Survival Of Kindness
programme.desc: BlackWoman is abandoned in a cage in the middle of the desert. Following her escape, she walks through pestilence and persecution, from desert to mountain to city, only to find more captivity.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Christmess
programme.desc: A once famous actor is now performing as Santa Claus in a mall because of his alcohol addiction. After meeting his estranged daughter he seeks help, in order to win her forgiveness.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: This is a story you've never heard before, a hilarious and heart warming comedy about Fred Claus, Santa's brother - and complete opposite. After growing up in saintly Nick's shadow, Fred becomes a grouch who's lost his belief in Christmas. Then, one magical December, Fred flies north (first class via reindeer) to find brother Nick is in trouble: a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever! Expect fun by the sleighful as Fred helps save Christmas and rediscovers the gift of family.

programme.title: A Christmas Story Christmas
programme.desc: Follows Ralphie, now an adult, who returns to the house on Cleveland Street to give his kids a magical Christmas like the one he had as a child, reconnecting with childhood friends.

programme.title: Holiday Harmony
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Gail lands an opportunity to compete for a once-in-a-lifetime shot at the big time, and heads cross-country, only getting as far as Harmony Springs, Oklahoma, when her ride, her budget and all her hopes are stalled. With just two weeks to get to the iHeartRadio Christmas Eve performance of her dreams, she takes the advice of local Jack-of-all-trades, Jeremy, and takes on a group of misfit kids hoping to perform in a Christmas Eve gala of their own. Gail and Jeremy grow close, but if she's going to fulfill her lifelong dream, she may have to leave him and the town she's grown to love behind.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: A Savage Christmas
programme.desc: After years of estrangement, transwoman Davina Savage returns for Christmas. Expecting her transition to be the focus, it's overshadowed by family secrets which threaten another Christmas lunch.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Christmas Hotel
programme.desc: Erin grew up in the small town of Mt Holly but always dreamt of living in a big city. Her first job - working the desk at the Mt Holly Inn - started her on a path to New York where she now works at the prestigious Windsor Hotel. When her boss tells her she will receive a promotion if she can pull off a big project, she is thrilled - until she realises the project is in her hometown. Erin returns home to discover that the locals don't appreciate their precious Mt. Holly Inn being bought out by a big corporation. And heading up the charge? Erin's ex-boyfriend Conner. But when several hotel staff members come down with the flu, Erin is forced to enlist Conner's help with hotel's Christmas events. As they two re-establish their relationship, Erin has to figure out if what she really wants is a promotion or to be home again.

programme.title: The Christmas Gift
programme.desc: A reporter searches for the stranger who unknowingly changed her life with an anonymous Christmas gift when they were children. Inspired by a true story.

programme.title: A Christmas Story Christmas
programme.desc: Follows Ralphie, now an adult, who returns to the house on Cleveland Street to give his kids a magical Christmas like the one he had as a child, reconnecting with childhood friends.

programme.title: Jingle Belle
programme.desc: Every year, Isabelle and her high school sweetheart Mike, rocked their small town's annual Christmas Eve Pageant with a sweet Christmas duet. But after graduation, Isabelle left to study at Juilliard in New York - leaving Mike behind. Years later, when Isabelle returns to her hometown to write music for the annual Christmas Eve Pageant, she is shocked to learn that Mike is the one directing the show. Can Isabelle and Mike put the past behind them and reunite on stage for another show-stopping duet?

programme.title: Holiday Harmony
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Gail lands an opportunity to compete for a once-in-a-lifetime shot at the big time, and heads cross-country, only getting as far as Harmony Springs, Oklahoma, when her ride, her budget and all her hopes are stalled. With just two weeks to get to the iHeartRadio Christmas Eve performance of her dreams, she takes the advice of local Jack-of-all-trades, Jeremy, and takes on a group of misfit kids hoping to perform in a Christmas Eve gala of their own. Gail and Jeremy grow close, but if she's going to fulfill her lifelong dream, she may have to leave him and the town she's grown to love behind.

programme.title: A Very Harold & Kumar Christmas
programme.desc: Following years of growing apart, Harold and Kumar embark on another ill-advised journey through NYC, where their search takes them through party heaven, and almost blows Christmas Eve sky-high.

programme.title: Random Acts of Christmas
programme.desc: While uncovering who is behind the random acts of Christmas popping up around her city, a journalist meets a competing reporter who captures her heart.

programme.title: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: Chloe plans the Christmas Fair where she meets Evan and falls in love but he goes to Norway for his dream job.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: A Snow Globe Christmas
programme.desc: While clasping her favourite Christmas snow globe, a cynical, overworked TV executive rants about how the movies she produces lie, making you think dreams come can come true. Upset, she tries to smash the globe, but instead it hits her on the head, knocking her out. She wakes up in a perfect snow-covered town like the one in her globe.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda, realizes the man she lives with has been unfaithful. Two women who have never met and live 6000 miles apart, find themselves in the exact same place. They meet online at a home exchange website and impulsively switch homes for the holiday. Iris moves into Amanda's L.A. house in sunny California as Amanda arrives in the snow covered English countryside. Shortly after arriving at their destinations, both women find the last thing either wants or expects: a new romance. Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: The Holdovers
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: The Wishmas Tree
programme.desc: A young possum's misguided wish for a white Wishmas freezes her entire hometown of Sanctuary City and threatens all who live there.

programme.title: Grumpy Cat's Worst Christmas Ever
programme.desc: A lonely cat living in a mall pet shop develops a sour outlook on life until, in the midst of the holiday rush, she meets a very special 12-year-old girl.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: You've Got Mail
programme.desc: Two anonymous emailers fall head-over-laptops in love, unaware they are fierce rivals in the bookshop business.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, particularly all the money spent and alone for the holiday for the first time in decades, as their daughter has just joined the Peace Corps, grumpy Luther Krank and his sweet wife, Nora, decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations, the cards, the parties and to spend the dollars saved on a 10-day Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Christmess
programme.desc: A once famous actor is now performing as Santa Claus in a mall because of his alcohol addiction. After meeting his estranged daughter he seeks help, in order to win her forgiveness.

programme.title: The Christmas Gift
programme.desc: A reporter searches for the stranger who unknowingly changed her life with an anonymous Christmas gift when they were children. Inspired by a true story.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Now
programme.desc: The holidays are approaching and the Ubriacco household is wrapped up in more turmoil than tinsel. James has unexpectedly found prosperity and job satisfaction as a highly paid private pilot for Samantha D'Bonne, the glamorous president of an international cosmetics firm. But while her husband is winging around the world, Mollie has to juggle her role as mum with her duties at her new job, labouring as an elf for a department store Santa.

programme.title: Silent Night
programme.desc: A father witnesses his son's death in a gang's crossfire on Christmas Eve. While recovering from a wound that costs him his voice, he makes vengeance his life's mission.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: Gotham City faces two monstrous criminal menaces: the bizarre, sinister Penguin and the slinky, mysterious Catwoman. Can Batman battle two formidable foes at once? Especially when one wants to be mayor and the other is romantically attracted to Bruce Wayne?

programme.title: A Savage Christmas
programme.desc: After years of estrangement, transwoman Davina Savage returns for Christmas. Expecting her transition to be the focus, it's overshadowed by family secrets which threaten another Christmas lunch.

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Once upon a Christmas Eve, an orphan baby crawled into Santa's bag of gifts and was taken to the North Pole. Raised by Papa Elf, Buddy comes to realise he doesn't fit in with the other elves. Determined to find a place where he belongs, Buddy searches for his real dad in New York City. In the Big Apple, Buddy finds out why his dad is on the naughty list. But most importantly, he sees that the world is seriously lacking in Christmas spirit, which causes Santa all kinds of problems. So with the help of a beautiful department store elf, Buddy tries to teach his dad and the world the true meaning of Christmas spirit and to prove to everyone that Santa really exists.

programme.title: A Very Harold & Kumar Christmas
programme.desc: Following years of growing apart, Harold and Kumar embark on another ill-advised journey through NYC, where their search takes them through party heaven, and almost blows Christmas Eve sky-high.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: The Holdovers
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go.

programme.title: Wishin' and Hopin'
programme.desc: In 1964 Connecticut, 10 year old Felix's holiday season is spiced up by the sudden arrivals of a substitute teacher and a feisty Russian student. Based on the bestseller by Wally Lamb.

programme.title: The Wishmas Tree
programme.desc: A young possum's misguided wish for a white Wishmas freezes her entire hometown of Sanctuary City and threatens all who live there.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: Jingle Belle
programme.desc: Every year, Isabelle and her high school sweetheart Mike, rocked their small town's annual Christmas Eve Pageant with a sweet Christmas duet. But after graduation, Isabelle left to study at Juilliard in New York - leaving Mike behind. Years later, when Isabelle returns to her hometown to write music for the annual Christmas Eve Pageant, she is shocked to learn that Mike is the one directing the show. Can Isabelle and Mike put the past behind them and reunite on stage for another show-stopping duet?

programme.title: Dora's Christmas Carol Adventure
programme.desc: Santa has warned Swiper again and again. If he keeps swiping on Christmas, he'll be permanently put on the naughty list. Will the Christmas tree star and party be ruined?

programme.title: My Dog's Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: A new relationship between a single dad and a woman with a devoted but demanding Maltese terrier may end before it begins as the jealous dog and the man's young son work to sabotage the budding romance.

programme.title: A Snow Globe Christmas
programme.desc: While clasping her favourite Christmas snow globe, a cynical, overworked TV executive rants about how the movies she produces lie, making you think dreams come can come true. Upset, she tries to smash the globe, but instead it hits her on the head, knocking her out. She wakes up in a perfect snow-covered town like the one in her globe.

programme.title: A Country Christmas Story
programme.desc: A starry-eyed young girl journeys from the mountains of Appalachia to the stage at Dollywood, where she discovers the impact of African Americans on the world of country music.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A hilarious, subversive and wickedly scary film about Gizmo the mogwai, a cuddly critter that multiplies with savage consequences. Great special effects and amazingly realistic mechanical creatures.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: A workaholic mother gets more than she bargained for when she hires a sought after consultant to help her and her family through the holidays.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: Maddie wishes for her sister Faith to experience true love for the first time. Next day, Faith finds a perfect match in Andrew. But as Christmas nears, she begins to wonder if Andrew really is the one for her.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: This is a story you've never heard before, a hilarious and heart warming comedy about Fred Claus, Santa's brother - and complete opposite. After growing up in saintly Nick's shadow, Fred becomes a grouch who's lost his belief in Christmas. Then, one magical December, Fred flies north (first class via reindeer) to find brother Nick is in trouble: a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever! Expect fun by the sleighful as Fred helps save Christmas and rediscovers the gift of family.

programme.title: Once Upon a Main Street
programme.desc: Amelia, who wants to open a year-round Christmas store, bids for a shop lot against Vic, who wants to open a chocolate shop. Rivalry becomes romance when they must work together.

programme.title: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: Chloe plans the Christmas Fair where she meets Evan and falls in love but he goes to Norway for his dream job.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: Maddie wishes for her sister Faith to experience true love for the first time. Next day, Faith finds a perfect match in Andrew. But as Christmas nears, she begins to wonder if Andrew really is the one for her.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, particularly all the money spent and alone for the holiday for the first time in decades, as their daughter has just joined the Peace Corps, grumpy Luther Krank and his sweet wife, Nora, decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations, the cards, the parties and to spend the dollars saved on a 10-day Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Dora's Dance to the Rescue
programme.desc: Put on your dancing shoes, because Dora needs you to spin, shake wiggle, jump and clap with her as she tries to rescue Swiper the fox, who's been trapped inside a bottle by a mean dancing elf.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist - a place of strange life forms, mountains of gold, deadly volcanoes, and more than one astonishing secret. Unable to stop him from going, Sean's new stepfather joins the quest. Together with a helicopter pilot and his beautiful, strong-willed daughter, they set out to find the island, rescue its lone inhabitant and escape before seismic shock waves force the island under the sea and bury its treasures forever.

programme.title: The Land Before Time
programme.desc: Join Littlefoot, Cera, Spike, Ducky and Petrie on their first journey together to find the lush, legendary Great Valley. Along the way, the prehistoric pals overcome many challenges and learn the value of teamwork and friendship.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Open Season 2
programme.desc: Boog and Elliot are back for more crazy adventures. After falling head over hooves in love with Giselle, Elliot's road to the altar takes a slight detour when Mr. Weenie is kidnapped by a group of pampered pets determined to return him to his owners. Boog, Elliot, McSquizzy, Buddy and the rest of the woodland creatures launch a full-scale rescue mission for their sausage-shaped friend and soon find themselves in enemy camp: the world of the pets. Led by a toy poodle named Fifi, the pets do not plan to let Mr. Weenie go without a fight. Can a toy poodle REALLY bring down a 900-pound grizzly bear? Will Elliot ever marry Giselle?

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives. Welcome to the most astonishing chapter of one of the most beloved animated franchises in film history: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World. Now chief and ruler of Berk alongside Astrid, Hiccup has created a gloriously chaotic dragon utopia. When the sudden appearance of a female Light Fury coincides with the darkest threat their village has ever faced, Hiccup and Toothless must leave the only home they've known and journey to a hidden world thought only to exist in myth. As their true destines are revealed, dragon and rider will fight together - to the very ends of the Earth - to protect everything they've grown to treasure.

programme.title: Rugrats Go Wild!
programme.desc: The Rugrats family vacation takes an exotic detour when their boat capsizes and they become marooned on a deserted tropical island. With the jungle as their new backyard, the babies race from one wild adventure to the next, soon to discover that someone else is on the island. It's The Wild Thornberries on an adventure of their own. When these two families get together, the excitement really starts!

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: He knows no fear. He knows no danger. He knows nothing! When the priceless Crown Jewels are stolen, bumbling Johnny English is the only secret agent in the country who can solve the crime. His prime suspects: a sinister businessman and a beautiful woman with a mysterious interest in Johnny's top-secret mission. Can the clueless super spy save the day without denting the nation's pride, or his super-cool Aston Martin spy car?

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Young Alan Parrish sits down as a young boy to play a game with his friend, Sarah, and on a roll of the dice is mysteriously transported into the strange jungle realm of Jumanji. There he remains trapped for 26 years, until two newly orphaned children, Judy and Peter, playing in the attic of Alan's childhood home, free the now-adult Alan from the game's clutches. But to defeat Jumanji's encroaching powers, the three reluctant players must find the now-grown Sarah and band together as a makeshift family to finish the game - before it finishes them.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: A legendary rivalry re-emerges when Jerry moves into New York City's finest hotel on the eve of the wedding of the century, forcing the desperate event planner to hire Tom to get rid of him. As mayhem ensues, the escalating cat-and-mouse battle soon threatens to destroy her career, the wedding, and possibly the hotel itself.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: As kids in the 1980s, Sam Brenner, Will Cooper, Ludlow Lamonsoff, and Eddie 'The Fire Blaster' Plant saved the world thousands of times - at 25 cents a game in the video arcades. Now, they're going to have to do it for real. When intergalactic aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as the models for their assaults, and now, US President Cooper must call on his old-school arcade friends to save the world from being destroyed by PAC-MAN, Donkey Kong, Galaga, Centipede, and Space Invaders. Joining them is Lt Col Violet Van Patten, a specialist supplying the arcaders with unique weapons to fight the aliens.

programme.title: Dora's Christmas Carol Adventure
programme.desc: Santa has warned Swiper again and again. If he keeps swiping on Christmas, he'll be permanently put on the naughty list. Will the Christmas tree star and party be ruined?

programme.title: The Wishmas Tree
programme.desc: A young possum's misguided wish for a white Wishmas freezes her entire hometown of Sanctuary City and threatens all who live there.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: Rango is an ordinary chameleon who accidentally winds up in the town of Dirt, a lawless outpost in the Wild West in desperate need of a new sheriff.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: The city needs heroes. Darkness has settled over New York City as Shredder and his evil Foot Clan have an iron grip on everything from the police to the politicians. The future is grim until four unlikely outcast brothers rise from the sewers and discover their destiny as Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The Turtles must work with fearless reporter April O'Neil and her wise-cracking cameraman Vern Fenwick to save the city and unravel Shredder's diabolical plan.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Migration
programme.desc: The Mallard family embark on a journey south for the winter to Jamaica via New York City, only for their well-laid plans to go awry, leading to new friends and unknown horizons.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie
programme.desc: The hood and The Man go head-to-head in this big screen version of the hit cartoon series. Arnold and his multi-ethnic gang must save their neighbourhood from the bulldozers in this refreshingly nuanced charmer featuring the voices of Jennifer Jason Leigh and Christopher Lloyd, among others.

programme.title: Trolls Band Together
programme.desc: Join Poppy and Branch on their latest adventure as they embark on an epic journey that lead to Branch's reunion with his BroZone brothers, and Poppy's long-lost sister, Viva.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood thought he saved the world when he destroyed his most infamous invention - a machine that turned water into food causing cheeseburger rain and spaghetti tornadoes. But Flint soon learns that his invention survived and is now combining food and animals to create 'foodimals'! Flint and his friends embark on an adventurously mouth-watering mission to battle hungry tacodiles, shrimpanzees, hippotatomuses, cheesepiders and other foodimals to save the world - again!

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Growing up the best of friends, they share the strong bond of free-spirited youth and good-natured rivalry. But the truth will ultimately set them at odds, as one becomes the ruler of the most powerful empire on earth, the other the chosen leader of his people. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the comic misadventures of a young Peruvian bear who travels to the city in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined until he meets the kindly Brown family who read the label around his neck that says "Please look after this bear. Thank you," and offer him a temporary haven. It looks as though his luck has changed until this rarest of bears catches the eye of a museum taxidermist.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A high velocity comedy about an underdog snail who kicks into overdrive when he miraculously attains the power of super-speed. But after making fast friends with a crew of streetwise, tricked-out es-car-goes, Turbo learns that no one succeeds on their own. So he puts his heart and shell on the line to help his pals achieve their dreams, before Turbo-charging his own impossible dream: winning the Indy 500.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: Dora Saves the Crystal Kingdom
programme.desc: A greedy king has stolen the colour from the Crystal Kingdom and it's up to Dora, Boots and their new friend Allie to save the day.

programme.title: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
programme.desc: Jimmy Neutron is a little kid with a big brain who has understanding parents who give him the liberty to exercise his inventive streak. They don't mind that their basement is full of gadgets that would have NASA astrophysicists scratching their heads, but when Jimmy's backpack rocket causes havoc, his mum grounds him. But Jimmy wouldn't want to miss the opening of a new fun-park, so he sneaks out. While he's out, his communications system finally makes contact with extra-terrestrials who kidnap not only Jimmy's parents, but all the parents in Retroville. Now, only Jimmy's bulging brain, with help from his robotic dog Goddard, best friend Carl and their other school chums, can save the day.

programme.title: Open Season: Scared Silly
programme.desc: When a case of mistaken identity leads both humans and animals to believe there is a werewolf on the prowl, former hunter Shaw tries to reopen open season.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Alex the lion is the king of the urban jungle, the main attraction at New York's Central Park Zoo. He and his best friends, Marty the zebra, Melman the giraffe and Gloria the hippo have spent their whole lives in blissful captivity before an admiring public and with regular meals provided for them. Not content to leave well enough alone, Marty lets his curiosity get the better of him and makes his escape with the help of some prodigious penguins to explore the world.

programme.title: Dora Saves the Snow Princess
programme.desc: A mean witch has locked La Princesa Sabrina in a tower and has stolen her magic crystal. Dora, Boots and the Snowflake Fairy set off to save the princess and her snowy forest.

programme.title: Oink
programme.desc: A nine-year-old girl gets a pig named Oink as a gift from her grandfather.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: An upper crust rodent lost in London's sewers gets a savvy female rat to save him from Le Frog, a French mercenary.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Adventures in Zambezia
programme.desc: When a young falcon named Kai learns of the famed bird city of Zambezia, he journeys there against his father's wishes. But when his dad is captured, Kai must rescue his father and new friends.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: Spring has sprung, and Verne and his woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat. Enter RJ, an opportunistic raccoon who explains that the world beyond the hedge is 'the gateway to the good life' where peculiar creatures called humans live to eat, rather than eat to live. "For humans," RJ proclaims, "enough is never enough."

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch," based on Dr. Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy suburban neighbourhood surrounded by white picket fences and flowering rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. Unbeknownst to the neighbours, hidden deep beneath this home is a vast secret hideout belonging to Gru, a dastardly villain who, along with the help of his many little minions, is planning the biggest heist in the history of the world: he's going to steal the moon!

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: The heartwarming adventure of Bella, a dog who embarks on an epic 644km journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: Monster House
programme.desc: Horace Nebbercracker is the meanest man in town, heaven forbid anything that lands on his lawn or he'll snatch it away forever. DJ's obsession with spying on the creepy house across the street has made him a bit of an outcast, but he's determined to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Inspector Sun
programme.desc: Fired from his detective job after a mission goes awry, Inspector Sun boards a seemingly normal plane for a much-needed vacation. However, when Dr. Spindlethorp receives a threat on his life, Sun is back on the case, trapped in a web of lies.

programme.title: Dora Saves the Crystal Kingdom
programme.desc: A greedy king has stolen the colour from the Crystal Kingdom and it's up to Dora, Boots and their new friend Allie to save the day.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Starting as single-celled yellow organisms, Minions evolve through the ages, perpetually serving the most despicable of masters. Continuously unsuccessful at keeping these masters, from T-rex to Napoleon, the Minions find themselves without someone to serve and fall into a deep depression. One Minion named Kevin has a plan, and he, alongside teenage rebel Stuart and lovable little Bob, ventures out into the world to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. The trio embarks upon a thrilling journey that ultimately leads them to their next potential master, Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever female supervillain. They travel from frigid Antarctica to 1960s New York City, ending in mod London, where they must face their biggest challenge to-date: saving all of Minionkind from annihilation.

programme.title: The Land Before Time
programme.desc: Join Littlefoot, Cera, Spike, Ducky and Petrie on their first journey together to find the lush, legendary Great Valley. Along the way, the prehistoric pals overcome many challenges and learn the value of teamwork and friendship.

programme.title: Curious George: Go West, Go Wild
programme.desc: Follows George and Ted as they travel to cousin Ginny's farm for a relaxing outdoor weekend, but plans take a turn when her farm animals escape.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist - a place of strange life forms, mountains of gold, deadly volcanoes, and more than one astonishing secret. Unable to stop him from going, Sean's new stepfather joins the quest. Together with a helicopter pilot and his beautiful, strong-willed daughter, they set out to find the island, rescue its lone inhabitant and escape before seismic shock waves force the island under the sea and bury its treasures forever.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover that there are six different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to six different kinds of music - funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash set out to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a daring mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: While the chickens on evil Mrs Tweedy's farm dream of a better life, a clever hen named Ginger is hatching plans to fly the coop for good. The only problem is, chickens can't fly or can they? Every escape attempt goes fowl until Rocky, a smooth-talking All-American rooster, crash-lands into the coop. It's hardly poultry in motion when Rocky attempts to teach Ginger and her fine feathered friends to fly but, with teamwork, determination and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt in a spectacular bid for freedom! Featuring unforgettable characters, incredible animation and all-star voice talent, this instant classic from the academy Award-winning creators of Wallace & Gromit is eggs-traordinary fun for the whole family!

programme.title: The Secret of the Sword
programme.desc: Prince Adam is sent to the world of Etheria to find his long abducted sister, Adora, and awaken her to her own destiny.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: The flightless angry birds and the scheming green piggies take their beef to the next level in The Angry Birds Movie 2! When a new threat emerges that puts both Bird and Pig Island in danger, Red, Chuck, Bomb, and Mighty Eagle recruit Chuck's sister Silver and team up with pigs Leonard, his assistant Courtney, and techpig Garry to forge an unsteady truce and form an unlikely super-team to save their homes.

programme.title: TMNT: Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: The Turtles set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers. They take on a crime syndicate, but soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary Lennox's parents suddenly die, she is sent to live with her uncle, Archibald Craven, on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the world's first family road trip. When their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home. As if patriarch Grug didn't already have enough to handle, it goes from bad to worse when they encounter an imaginative nomad named Guy. With Guy's help the Croods conquer their fear of the outside world and discover that they have exactly what it takes to survive - each other.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a doubting boy boards a magical train that's headed to the North Pole and Santa Claus's home.

programme.title: Paw Patrol: Ready, Race, Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the Adventure Bay 500! The pups are ready to be the pit crew for their race hero, The Whoosh. When the legendary racer is unable to drive, he calls on Marshall to take the wheel.

programme.title: The Pirates! Band of Misfits
programme.desc: Set sail for a fun-filled voyage and hilarious pirate antics with the biggest band of misfits on the seven seas. When the infamous Pirate Captain is shunned once again by his rivals Black Bellamy and Cutlass Liz, he sets his sights to win the coveted Pirate of the Year Award. With his trusted dodo, Polly, and ragtag crew at his side, the Pirate Captain will need to battle a diabolical queen, save a young scientist and never lose sight of what a pirate loves best: adventure.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Join the fun when the Little family adopts an adorably spunky boy named Stuart, who looks a lot like a mouse. Mr and Mrs Little fall in love with Stuart right away, but their older son, George, isn't so sure. As Stuart tries to win over his new brother with hilarious feats of courage and daring, the family's cat, Snowbell, gets involved with a gang of shady felines who devise a dastardly plan to get Stuart out of the house - permanently.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A street kid caught vandalising an aquarium bonds with a mighty killer whale while cleaning up his graffiti. When he learns that the orca is worth more dead than alive, he risks everything to free it.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: Trolls Band Together
programme.desc: Join Poppy and Branch on their latest adventure as they embark on an epic journey that lead to Branch's reunion with his BroZone brothers, and Poppy's long-lost sister, Viva.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time when prehistoric creatures roamed the earth, Early Man tells the story of courageous caveman Dug and his sidekick Hognob who, together with their fearless new friend Goona, must unite their Stone Age Tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: As kids in the 1980s, Sam Brenner, Will Cooper, Ludlow Lamonsoff, and Eddie 'The Fire Blaster' Plant saved the world thousands of times - at 25 cents a game in the video arcades. Now, they're going to have to do it for real. When intergalactic aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as the models for their assaults, and now, US President Cooper must call on his old-school arcade friends to save the world from being destroyed by PAC-MAN, Donkey Kong, Galaga, Centipede, and Space Invaders. Joining them is Lt Col Violet Van Patten, a specialist supplying the arcaders with unique weapons to fight the aliens.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee appears at the door of a stressed young mother, who is trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war. But once she's arrived, Nanny McPhee discovers that the children are fighting a war of their own against two spoiled city cousins who have just moved in and refuse to leave.

programme.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween follows the Quinn family - high school senior Sarah, her middle school brother Sony, and their mother Kathy into an entirely new set of spooky, exciting, and funny events. Sonny and schoolmate Sam are best friends with a side job as the "Junk Brothers," collecting discarded stuff other people don't want. But it's a gig that unfortunately leads them right into the path of (gulp) Slappy, the mischievous ventriloquist dummy from an unpublished Goosebumps book.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: Dr. Seuss' The Lorax is an adaptation of Dr. Seuss' classic tale of a forest creature who shares the enduring power of hope. In the walled city of Thneed-Ville, where everything is artificial and even the air is a commodity, a boy named Ted hopes to win the heart of his dream girl, Audrey. When he learns of her wish to see a real tree, Ted seeks out the Once-ler, a ruined old businessman outside of town in a stark wasteland. Upon hearing of how the hermit gave into his greed for profits and devastated the land over the protests of the Lorax, Ted is inspired to undo the disaster. However, the greedy Mayor of Thneed-Ville, Aloysius O'Hare, has made his fortune exploiting the environmental collapse and is determined to stop the boy from undermining his business.

programme.title: Flipper
programme.desc: Dive into adventure in the sun-drenched Florida Keys with this action-packed family favourite. When Sandy Ricks is sent to Coral Key to stay with his salty Uncle Porter for the summer, he never dreamed he would become best mates with a feisty, orphaned dolphin named Flipper. In no time, the two new friends become caught up in a series of high-seas escapades and Sandy discovers a whole new outlook on life in this heart-warming adventure.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two Miami cops must find $100 million in stolen heroin before their department is shut down. With time running out, detectives Burnett and Lowrey track a master thief into the Miami underworld, dodging bullets and bad guys along the way. A sexy witness can identify the suspect, but a mix-up causes her to believe Burnett is Lowrey, forcing the partners to switch identities. Now, between shoot-outs and car chases, married man Burnett has to stick close to their only witness, while playboy Lowrey goes home to his partner's wife and kids to learn the joys of parenthood - the hard way.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: Ex-assassin Robert McCall confronts his past as he battles the Italian mafia.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: Robin Hood, the legendary figure of 13th century England, who along with his band of marauders confront corruption in the local village of Nottingham and lead an uprising against the crown that will forever alter the balance of world power. Whether regarded as thief or hero, one man from humble beginnings will become an eternal symbol of freedom for his people.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: A washed up MMA fighter is unaware of his hidden lineage or why he is being hunted down by Sub Zero of the Lin Kuei clan of assassins Concerned for the safety of his family, he seeks out a team of fighters who were chosen to defend Earthrealm in a high-stakes battle against the forces of Outworld.

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: Before she was Wonder Woman, she was Diana, princess of the Amazons, trained to be an unconquerable warrior. Raised on a sheltered island paradise, when an American pilot crashes on their shores and tells of a massive conflict raging in the outside world, Diana leaves her home, convinced she can stop the threat. Fighting alongside man in a war to end all wars, Diana will discover her full powers and her true destiny.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: The Jurassic World theme park lets guests experience the thrill of witnessing actual dinosaurs, but something ferocious lurks behind the park's attractions - a genetically modified dinosaur with savage capabilities. When the massive creature escapes, chaos erupts across the island. Now it's up to Owen and Claire to save the park's tourists from an all-out prehistoric assault.

programme.title: Kick-Ass
programme.desc: A story where an ordinary New York teenager and rabid comic book geek dons a green and yellow wetsuit to become the no-nonsense vigilante, Kick-Ass. The eager young hero quickly becomes a phenomenon, capturing the imagination of the public. He's not the only superhero out there. A fearless father-daughter crime-fighting duo, Big Daddy and Hit Girl, have been slowly but surely taking down the criminal empire of local Mafioso, Frank D'Amico.

programme.title: Passengers
programme.desc: A spacecraft transporting thousands of people to a distant planet has a malfunction in its sleep chambers, and as a result two passengers are awakened 90 years too early.

programme.title: Blood Diamond
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of civil war and chaos in 1990s Sierra Leone, this film tells the story of Danny Archer, a South African mercenary, and Solomon Vandy, a Mende fisherman. Both men are African, but their histories are as different as can be, until their fates become joined in a common quest to recover a rare pink diamond that can transform their lives. With the help of Maddy Bowen, an American journalist whose idealism is tempered by a deepening connection with Archer, the two men embark on a trek through rebel territory a journey that could save Solomon's family and give Archer the second chance he thought he would never have.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: We all have a superhero inside us, it just takes a bit of magic to bring it out. In Billy Batson's case, by shouting out one word-SHAZAM!-this streetwise 14-year-old foster kid can turn into the adult Super Hero Shazam, courtesy of an ancient wizard. Still a kid at heart-inside a ripped, godlike body-Shazam revels in this adult version of himself by doing what any teen would do with superpowers: have fun with them! Can he fly? Does he have X-ray vision? Can he shoot lightning out of his hands? Can he skip his social studies test? Shazam sets out to test the limits of his abilities with the joyful recklessness of a child. But he'll need to master these powers quickly in order to fight the deadly forces of evil controlled by Dr Thaddeus Sivana.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: The famous symbologist Robert Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia and finds himself the target of a manhunt. Langdon teams up with Sienna Brooks; a doctor he hopes will help him recover his memories. Together, they race across Europe and against the clock to stop a virus that would wipe out half of the world's population.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The greatest adventure of all time begins with a young crew's maiden voyage on board the most advanced starship ever created: the USS Enterprise. In the midst of an incredible journey full of optimism, intrigue, comedy and cosmic peril, the new recruits must find a way to stop an evil being whose mission of vengeance threatens all of mankind. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: The Kingdom
programme.desc: FBI agents sent to Saudi Arabia to nab a mass murderer team up with their Arab counterparts in a do-or-die mission for unlikely allies.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: Capitol Policeman John Cale has just been denied his dream job with the Secret Service of protecting President James Sawyer. Not wanting to let down his little girl with the news, he takes her on a tour of the White House, during which the complex is overtaken by a heavily armed paramilitary group. Now, with the nation's government falling into chaos and time running out, it's up to Cale to save the president, his daughter, and the country.

programme.title: The Man from U.N.C.L.E.
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of the early 1960s, at the height of the Cold War, this action centres on CIA agent Solo and KGB agent Kuryakin. Forced to put aside longstanding hostilities, the two team up on a joint mission to stop a mysterious international criminal organisation, which is bent on destabilising the fragile balance of power through the proliferation of nuclear weapons and technology. The duo's only lead is the daughter of a vanished German scientist, who is the key to infiltrating the criminal organisation, and they must race against time to find him and prevent a worldwide catastrophe.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Now that Chris and his girlfriend Rose have reached the meet-the-parents milestone of dating, she invites him for a weekend getaway at her parents' upstate home. At first, Chris reads the family's overly accommodating behaviour as nervous attempts to deal with their daughter's interracial relationship, but as the weekend progresses, a series of increasingly disturbing discoveries lead him to a truth that he could have never imagined.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: When a young nun at a cloistered abbey in Romania takes her own life, a priest with a haunted past and a novitiate on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate. Together they uncover the order's unholy secret. Risking not only their lives but their faith and their very souls, they confront a malevolent force in the form of the same demonic nun that first terrorised audiences in "The Conjuring 2" as the abbey becomes a horrific battleground between the living and the damned.

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: A system of satellites designed to protect the earth from natural disasters starts to malfunction, but who is responsible and can it be stopped?

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel blows up in their faces, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together, though neither knows that the other is a federal agent. Suddenly, everyone on both sides of the law wants them dead, and their only hope is to trust each other.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: Targeted by a cold-blooded black ops assassin with a score to settle, their only hope is to get behind the wheel again and secure an ingenious prototype tracking device. Facing their greatest threat yet in places as far away as Abu Dhabi and as familiar as the Los Angeles streets they call home, the crew must come together once again as a team, and as a family, to protect their own.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: The mysterious story of two magicians whose intense rivalry leads them on a lifelong battle for supremacy full of obsession, deceit, and jealousy with dangerous and deadly consequences. From the time that they first met as young magicians on the rise, Robert Anglier and Alfred Borden were competitors. However, their friendly competition evolves into a bitter rivalry making them fierce enemies-for-life and consequently jeopardising the lives of everyone around them. Full of twists and turns, this film is set against the backdrop of turn-of-the-century London.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: Cole is sent back in time to save the human race from a deadly virus that has forced mankind into dank underground communities in the future. Along his travels, he encounters a psychiatrist and a mental patient who may hold the key to the mysterious rogue group, the Army of the 12 Monkeys, thought to be responsible for unleashing the killer disease. Believing he can obtain a pure virus sample in order to find a cure in the future, he is met with one riddle after another that puts him in a race with time.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Dispatched on a rescue mission to the farthest reaches of space, Captain Kirk, Spock and the crew become separated when they are ambushed with no means of escape.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with girlfriend Marie. But his plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt. Now hunted by an unknown enemy, Bourne proves to be neither an easy target nor a person whose skill, determination and resilience can be underestimated.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: The Punisher is around and trouble begins when he accidentally kills an undercover FBI agent while raiding the warehouse of Mafia warlord Billy the Face, prompting a crisis of conscience in the vigilante. Billy is then fed through a glass recycling machine, creating one of the Punisher's greatest comic book enemies, Jigsaw. The unfortunate agent had stashed away all of Jigsaw's racketeering money, and the bad guy decides to lean on the dead man's widow and daughter to recover it, which doesn't go down at all with The Punisher.

programme.title: Scream 3
programme.desc: Chapter one sets the rules. Chapter two bends the rules. In chapter three, however, all bets are off: there are no rules. Sidney Prescott has literally disappeared off the face of the Earth, hiding herself from the world and the entire haunted, blood-stained legacy that is Woodsboro. But that is all about to change. A new slasher flick based on Sidney's twisted tale is being shot in LA, called Stab 3, and one by one the cast are taking their final curtain call. Someone is mimicking the horrific murders of the first two Scream films, only this time, even the leads are being murdered.

programme.title: Godzilla
