programme.desc: A troubled war veteran begins to unravel, thread by thread, in this gripping single-character drama.

programme.title: The Duchess
programme.desc: The duchess of Devonshire was the original 'it girl', long before the concept existed. Like her direct descendant, Princess Diana, she was ravishing, glamorous and adored by an entire country. Determined to be a player in the wider affairs of the world, she proved that she could out-gamble, out-drink and outwit most of the aristocratic men who surrounded her.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The continuing story of the Crawley family.

programme.title: As Good as it Gets
programme.desc: An antisocial writer, a single mother, and a gay artist become unlikely friends in this comedy-drama.

programme.title: A Beautiful Day In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: The true story of a real-life friendship between beloved neighbour Fred Rogers and journalist Tom Junod.

programme.title: Hostile Waters
programme.desc: In this fact-based story, a Soviet captain edges his K-219 nuclear sub silently into the hostile waters of the Atlantic, where he collides with a US submarine, causing a nuclear threat to the US coast.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: In the Gloaming
programme.desc: A loving mother, a son in search of peace, four people separated by more than miles. Now, in the twilight of their time together, reconciliation finally begins for a family who never really knew each other until it was almost too late.

programme.title: Joe's Palace
programme.desc: Stephen Poliakoff's story of the relationship between Elliot, a wealthy Londoner, and Joe, a teenager who tends to Elliot's empty house, and of Elliot's fear that his father was a Nazi.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: It's Halloween, 1991. Near Gloucester, Massachusetts, the six members of the Andrea Gail, a swordfishing boat, head out to sea for their last trip of the season. Unbeknownst to them, a shockingly brutal storm is slowly gaining steam. Before the National Weather Bureau has a chance to inform the crew of the impending danger, it's too late. The resulting battle with three merging weather fronts, an unheralded natural disaster, is gruelling and tragic. Based on the true-life bestselling novel by Sebastian Junger.

programme.title: The 33
programme.desc: The incredible true story of 33 miners who were trapped for 69 days following the collapse of the gold and copper mine.

programme.title: Elizabeth
programme.desc: This is the critically acclaimed epic of the queen's turbulent and treacherous rise to power. Before the Golden Age, Elizabeth was a passionate and naive girl who came to reign over a land divided by bloody turmoil. Amid palace intrigue and attempted assassinations, the queen is forced to become a cunning strategist while weighing the counsel of her mysterious advisors, thwarting her devious rivals and denying her own desires for the good of her country.

programme.title: Indictment: The McMartin Trial
programme.desc: A fact-based drama based on the longest and most expensive trial in American history that ended without a single conviction.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: This film propels you into a future of astounding technology and adventure beyond the human imagination in an extraordinary story. In a future world of runaway global warming and awe-inspiring scientific advances, humans share every aspect of their lives with sophisticated companion robots called Mechas. However, when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family aren't prepared for the consequences. Suddenly, David is on his own in a strange and dangerous world. Befriended by a streetwise Mecha, David embarks on a spectacular quest to discover the startling secret of his own identity.

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and little to show for it. Now, Max has to transport Vincent to his next job, one night, five stops, five hits and one getaway. And after this fateful night, neither man will ever be the same again. Tonight everything is changing.

programme.title: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A doctor plunges into an erotic foray that threatens his marriage, and may ensnare him in a murder mystery, after his wife's admission of sexual longings. The story sweeps from doubt and fear to self-discovery and reconciliation.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Any Given Sunday
programme.desc: Life is a contact sport and football is life. At the 50-yard line of this gridiron cosmos is Tony D'Amato, the embattled Sharks coach facing a full-on blitz of team strife, plus a new, marketing-savvy Sharks owner who's sure Tony is way too old school. An injured quarterback, a flashy, bull-headed backup quarterback, a slithery team doctor and a running back with an incentive-laden contract also provide some of the stories that zigzag like diagrams in a playbook.

programme.title: Invictus
programme.desc: The inspiring true story of how Nelson Mandela joined forces with the captain of South Africa's rugby team, Francois Pienaar, to help unite their country.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: Pete and Ellie must learn the ropes of instant parenthood when they bring in three foster children. Inspired by a true story, discover this must-see family comedy from the creators of Daddy's Home.

programme.title: O Brother, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Disenchanted with the daily drudge of crushing rocks on a prison farm in Mississippi, the dapper, silver-tongued Ulysses Everett McGill busts loose. Except he's still shackled to his two chain-mates from the chain gang: bad-tempered Pete and sweet, dim-witted Delmar. With nothing to lose and buried loot to regain - before it's lost forever in a flood - the three embark on the adventure of a lifetime in this hilarious, offbeat road picture. Populated with strange characters, including a blind prophet, sexy sirens and a one-eyed Bible salesman, it's an odyssey filled with chases, close calls, near misses, and betrayal that will leave you laughing at every outrageous and surprising twist and turn.

programme.title: Cinema Verite
programme.desc: The story dramatises the genesis of the original series when Pat and Bill Loud are approached to participate in the project by filmmaker Craig Gilbert, and agree to have cameras follow their family in and around Santa Barbara for several months. Gilbert believed that the struggles of an everyday family would be relatable to Americans in a way that The Brady Bunch and The Partridge Family were not.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Elwood, after serving his time in prison, finds he is now the lone 'Blues Brother' and is once again enlisted by Sister Mary Stigmata in her latest crusade to raise funds for a children's hospital. Once again hitting the road to re-unite the band for the New Orleans Battle of the Bands, Elwood is pursued cross-country in yet another colossal car chase, led by Cabel the Curtis' son, the Russian Mafia, and a militia group. This time, Elwood has the help of a young orphan, and a strip club bartender.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: Montgomery Brewster is a minor league baseball pitcher who discovers he has to blow $30 million in 30 days as a condition to inherit a much greater fortune. Here's the catch, he will forfeit everything if he reveals to a soul the real reason he seems to be throwing away all that cash. With the help of his pal Spike they set off on a frantic spending spree the likes of which would bring any self-respecting accountant to his knees.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: After the release of Jake Blues from prison, he and brother Elwood go to visit the orphanage where they were raised by nuns. They learn that the church stopped its support and will sell the place unless the tax on the property is paid within 11 days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their blues band back together and staging a big gig. They may be on a 'mission from God' but they're making enemies everywhere they go.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: While visiting the Earth at Night, a group of alien botanists is discovered and disturbed by an approaching human task force. Because of the more than hasty take-off, one of the visitors is left behind. The little alien finds himself all alone on a very strange planet. Fortunately, the extra-terrestrial soon finds a friend and emotional companion in 10-year-old Elliot, who discovered him looking for food in his family's garden shed. While E.T. slowly gets acquainted with Elliot's brother Michael, his sister Gertie as well as with Earth customs, members of the task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from Outer Space.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An ambitious genetic experiment takes the wrong turn when two twins - who look nothing alike - are born and then separated. Years later, the unlikely siblings meet: Julius, a highly educated but sheltered giant with a big heart, and Vincent, a pint-sized hustler with an insatiable lust for women and money. With girlfriends in tow and a hitman on their tail, the new-found brothers set off on a wild, cross-country misadventure to find their mother - but end up finding out more about themselves.

programme.title: The Dead Pool
programme.desc: Detective Harry Callahan probes the murders on a celebrity list that sickos bet on to pick who will die next. When he hears he's on the list, it gets deadly serious.

programme.title: With Six You Get Eggroll
programme.desc: Two widowed people fall in love and marry, unprepared for the hostile reactions of their children.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: The Brady Bunch live in the LA suburbs, a community beset by economic adversity, a crime rate spiralling out of control and the challenges of the information superhighway. In the middle of it all, the Bradys live a chaotically idyllic existence with their kids, where '70s values reign. But problems arise to upset this perfect world. Carol and Mike face a considerable dilemma when confronted with an overdue property tax bill.

programme.title: Goodfellas
programme.desc: Based on the bestselling biography, Henry Hill is a small time gangster, who takes part in a violent robbery with two ambitious gangsters.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Private Benjamin
programme.desc: An upper-class socialite, disappointed with life, impulsively joins the army. After a disastrous initiation, she finds direction and self-esteem for the first time.

programme.title: The Tuskegee Airmen
programme.desc: The true story of how a group of African American pilots overcame racist opposition to become one of the finest US fighter groups in World War II.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: Matt and Christina Drayton are a couple whose attitudes are challenged when their daughter brings home a fiance who is black.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: A former river guide arranges a white-water rafting trip to celebrate her son's birthday and salvage her shaky marriage. Her skills and courage are soon put to the test when three mysterious strangers threaten to turn their vacation into a living hell.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A hilarious, subversive and wickedly scary film about Gizmo the mogwai, a cuddly critter that multiplies with savage consequences. Great special effects and amazingly realistic mechanical creatures.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: The Dark Knight is back, now battling two supervillains simultaneously, but this time joined by his protege, Robin, to protect Gotham City. They face criminal geniuses The Riddler and Two-Face. Together, these criminal kingpins present a threat that only the dynamic duo, Batman and Robin, can stop.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A big giant head of alien power is heading toward earth, destroying everything in its path. Who you gonna call? Not that whippersnapper Will Decker, that's for sure - even if he is the new commander of a revamped Enterprise. One look at that great ball of fire convinces Captain Kirk that only one man can save the world.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Winnfield and Vincent Vega are two hitmen out to retrieve a suitcase stolen from their employer, mob boss Marcellus Wallace. Wallace has also asked Vincent to take his wife Mia out a few days later when Wallace himself will be out of town. Butch Coolidge is an ageing boxer who is paid by Wallace to lose his next fight. Honey Bunny and Pumpkin are a couple of young lovers and small time thieves who decide they need a change of venue. The lives of these seemingly unrelated people are woven together in a wildly entertaining and exhilarating motion picture adventure that both thrills and amuses.

programme.title: The Replacement Killers
programme.desc: International superstar Chow Yun-Fat makes his Hollywood debut with Oscar (R) winner Mira Sorvino in THE REPLACEMENT KILLERS, a fierce and explosive action thriller from director Antoine Fuqua. After he betrays Mr. Wei, the ruthless crime boss who hired him to avenge his son's death, professional killer John Lee (chow Yun-Fat) goes on the run. Enlisting the aid of beautiful document forger Meg Coburn (Mira Sorvino), Lee attempts to return to his family in China before they are victimised by his betrayal. But Wei's army of "replacement killers" is hot on his trail, and now both he and Meg are targets of their impressive firepower. With both sides fully armed and determined to fight to the death, an ultra-violent shootout breaks out when they finally face off against each other.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Now
programme.desc: The holidays are approaching and the Ubriacco household is wrapped up in more turmoil than tinsel. James has unexpectedly found prosperity and job satisfaction as a highly paid private pilot for Samantha D'Bonne, the glamorous president of an international cosmetics firm. But while her husband is winging around the world, Mollie has to juggle her role as mum with her duties at her new job, labouring as an elf for a department store Santa.

programme.title: Drop Dead Fred
programme.desc: Every kid has an imaginary friend. Only Elizabeth isnt a kid and Drop Dead Fred is anything but imaginary. With a haircut this bad, he has to be real - and his mischief has Elizabeth in big trouble. When she splits with her husband, Elizabeth turns to her best friend. But it's her mum who sends her back home where she discovers her childhood friend, Fred. Having been locked in a box for 21 years, Fred is bursting with energy to turn Elizabeth's life into a rowdy, rollicking, racy adventure.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: Power company repairman Roy Neary witnesses unidentified flying objects in the skies near his Muncie, Indiana home. The encounter sets into action a startling chain of dramatic events. Trying desperately to understand what he has seen, Neary is increasingly driven to the emotional edge by the governmental cover up that's blocking him. With his wife struggling in vain to understand what is happening as their relationship disintegrates, Neary finds an ally in Jillian Guiler, a woman who has also witnessed nocturnal encounters and whose young son has been abducted by the alien visitors. As Roy and Jillian look for an answer to the extraordinary mystery that has engulfed them, an international team of scientists led by Claude Lacombe, a dedicated French expert on extraordinary phenomena, also pursues the truth. As Lacombe and company seek to understand the phenomenon of the skies and look for a communications break-through, their cosmic detective work reaches from the Indiana plains across the world to a remote hillside in India and then to the one place that holds the answer in an ultimate close encounter.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: While visiting the Earth at Night, a group of alien botanists is discovered and disturbed by an approaching human task force. Because of the more than hasty take-off, one of the visitors is left behind. The little alien finds himself all alone on a very strange planet. Fortunately, the extra-terrestrial soon finds a friend and emotional companion in 10-year-old Elliot, who discovered him looking for food in his family's garden shed. While E.T. slowly gets acquainted with Elliot's brother Michael, his sister Gertie as well as with Earth customs, members of the task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from Outer Space.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: This film propels you into a future of astounding technology and adventure beyond the human imagination in an extraordinary story. In a future world of runaway global warming and awe-inspiring scientific advances, humans share every aspect of their lives with sophisticated companion robots called Mechas. However, when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family aren't prepared for the consequences. Suddenly, David is on his own in a strange and dangerous world. Befriended by a streetwise Mecha, David embarks on a spectacular quest to discover the startling secret of his own identity.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Peter Banning is a 40-year-old corporate takeover lawyer who has lost any memory of being Peter Pan. Peter and his family travel to London to visit Granny Wendy. Peter discovers a note from Captain Hook informing Peter that he has kidnapped his children. With the encouragement of Tinkerbell, Peter once again takes wing, and it's off to Neverland to rescue his kids.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Eccentric scientist John Hammond plans to open a theme park consisting of live dinosaurs, genetically engineered from DNA. Archaeologists Alan Grant and Ellie Sattler are invited to view the park, only to find themselves being hunted when the dinosaurs break free.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: The World According to Garp
programme.desc: This story chronicles the life of T. S. Garp, the illegitimate son of a feminist mother, who is a quirky everyman, a wistful writer wrestling with our screw loose modern age.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: The violent Cuban gangster Tony 'Scarface' Montana becomes a cocaine king in Miami. His greed and ego prove his undoing as ruthless rivals plot to take over his drug empire.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: The Brady Bunch live in the LA suburbs, a community beset by economic adversity, a crime rate spiralling out of control and the challenges of the information superhighway. In the middle of it all, the Bradys live a chaotically idyllic existence with their kids, where '70s values reign. But problems arise to upset this perfect world. Carol and Mike face a considerable dilemma when confronted with an overdue property tax bill.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: In the year 1971, San Francisco faces the terror of a maniac known as Scorpio, who snipes at innocent victims and demands ransom through notes left at the scene of the crime. Inspector Harry Callahan (known as Dirty Harry by his peers through his reputation handling of homicidal cases) is assigned to the case along with his newest partner Inspector Chico Gonzalez to track down Scorpio and stop him. Using humiliation and cat and mouse type of games against Callahan, Scorpio is put to the test with the cop with a dirty attitude.

programme.title: Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome
programme.desc: Max stumbles into a desert city in the post-apocalyptic world that is built on the principle of unbridled, cutthroat capitalism where anything - even a human life - can be bartered. Caught in a power struggle between the city's two rulers, Max breaks the one inviolable rule of a city with no other rules when he refuses to kill.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: With the Klingon Empire on the verge of collapse, the Klingons turn to their old enemy, The Federation, for help. But first, Kirk and his crew must unravel a deadly conspiracy against the peacemakers.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: The Dark Knight is back, now battling two supervillains simultaneously, but this time joined by his protege, Robin, to protect Gotham City. They face criminal geniuses The Riddler and Two-Face. Together, these criminal kingpins present a threat that only the dynamic duo, Batman and Robin, can stop.

programme.title: Cast a Deadly Spell
programme.desc: The mystery story takes place during the 1940s in an alternate universe where nearly everyone uses magic, tarot cards and talismans in everyday life. One person who doesn't is private eye H.P. Lovecraft. Grizzled and old-fashioned, he feels out of place in a world increasingly dominated by the supernatural arts. When he's hired by a wealthy, elderly man to look for the Necronomicon, Lovecraft gets entangled in a mystery which will have him running into gargoyles, zombies, witches, demons, unicorns and a whole bunch of other animatronic puppets.

programme.title: Boyz N the Hood
programme.desc: Half-brothers Doughboy and Ricky Baker are foils for each other's personality, presenting very different approaches to the tough lives they face. Ricky is the 'All-American' athlete, looking to win a football scholarship to USC and seeks salvation through sports, while 'Dough' succumbs to the violence, alcohol, and crime surrounding him in his environment, but maintains a strong sense of pride and code of honour. Between these two is their friend Tre, who is lucky to have a father, 'Furious' Styles, to teach him to have the strength of character to do what is right and to always take responsibility for his actions.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Elwood, after serving his time in prison, finds he is now the lone 'Blues Brother' and is once again enlisted by Sister Mary Stigmata in her latest crusade to raise funds for a children's hospital. Once again hitting the road to re-unite the band for the New Orleans Battle of the Bands, Elwood is pursued cross-country in yet another colossal car chase, led by Cabel the Curtis' son, the Russian Mafia, and a militia group. This time, Elwood has the help of a young orphan, and a strip club bartender.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: The Enforcer
programme.desc: Macho cop 'Dirty Harry' Callahan grudgingly takes on a female partner. San Francisco's mayor has been kidnapped and it's only a matter of time until the fatal showdown.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking
programme.desc: A single mother searches for a suitable man to become the father of her precocious baby.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: Mikey the wisecracking tot acquires a baby sister with the same wry sense of humor. Meanwhile their parents have emerged out of wedded bliss to face some real-life issues involving money problems and a gun-toting relative. Mikey is also learning how to use the toilet for the first time.

programme.title: Jaws 3
programme.desc: When a young great white shark gets into a theme park, the manager keeps it for a new exhibit. But he didn't expect the angry mother to turn up looking for it.

programme.title: The Craft
programme.desc: Neve Campbell, Fairuza Balk and Robin Tunney star in this teen thriller about four private school misfits who form a coven to summon the dark forces they need to wreak havoc on their persecutors. Having just moved to Los Angeles, Sarah (Tunney) is an outsider at St. Benedict's Academy until she meets three other social outcasts. Nancy (Balk), Bonnie (ampbell) and Rochelle (Rachel True) will never fit in with the "in" crowd. Nancy, Bonnie and Rochelle dabble in the occult, and when they notice Sarah has the powers of a natural witch, they talk her into joining their coven. With the addition of a fourth witch they find they can cast spells they couldn't before, and the teenage witches are suddenly not only able to get the attention, praise and love they have long been denied, but also to exact vengeance on classmates, parents and boyfriends. They learn, however, that everything comes with a price. Support cast includes Skeet Ulrich and Rachel True.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Mel Gibson first made his mark on movie history as heroic loner Max, who drives the roads of outback Australia in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other scraggly defenders of a fuel-depot encampment are the bizarre warriors commanded by The Humungus, notorious for never taking prisoners when they can pulverize them instead. With The Road Warrior on your side, screen action doesn't get any better.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and his crew must deal with Mr Spock's long-lost half-brother who hijacks the Enterprise for an obsessive search for god at the centre of the galaxy.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: A magical sword, a notorious assassin, a nobleman's daughter, a breathtaking quest: it adds up to the top foreign language film of all time.

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
programme.desc: Dracula, the vampire doomed as a creature of the night after forsaking God, is aroused by the image of a woman resembling his lost love.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Animal House
programme.desc: This raunchy, screwball comedy offers a relentless spoof of 1960s college life by following the hilarious adventures of the Delta fraternity.

programme.title: The Big Lebowski
programme.desc: The Dude, Jeff Lebowski is unemployed and laid-back until victim of mistaken identity, two thugs break into his apartment in the errant belief that they are accosting Jeff Lebowski the pasadena millionare. In the hope of getting a replacement for his soiled carpet Dude visits his wealthy namesake and, with buddy, ex 'nam' veteran, Walter, he is swept into a consequence comedy/thriller of extortion, embezzlement, sex & dope.

programme.title: Against the Wall
programme.desc: A guard is caught up in a prison riot fuelled by bad prison management.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: Based on a Stephen King novel, Cujo is a happy St. Bernard until he is bitten on the nose by a rabid bat and slowly begins manifesting the symptoms of his fatal illness. His condition deteriorates as he attacks people again and again, until finally, mum Donna Trenton and her son Tad are trapped inside the family car with Cujo lurking nearby, set to kill them any way he can. A showdown is inevitable.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: With the title track sung by the Ramones fright meister Stephen King directs this chilling tale about a magical Indian burial ground. When his three-year-old son is killed on the road outside his home, Dr Louis Creed begins to think about the stories surrounding the ancient cemetery and how those buried there can be resurrected.

programme.title: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Karen Blixen establishes a plantation in Africa. Meeting her true love, Denys, allows her to rethink her priorities in the midst of this vast land.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: Power company repairman Roy Neary witnesses unidentified flying objects in the skies near his Muncie, Indiana home. The encounter sets into action a startling chain of dramatic events. Trying desperately to understand what he has seen, Neary is increasingly driven to the emotional edge by the governmental cover up that's blocking him. With his wife struggling in vain to understand what is happening as their relationship disintegrates, Neary finds an ally in Jillian Guiler, a woman who has also witnessed nocturnal encounters and whose young son has been abducted by the alien visitors. As Roy and Jillian look for an answer to the extraordinary mystery that has engulfed them, an international team of scientists led by Claude Lacombe, a dedicated French expert on extraordinary phenomena, also pursues the truth. As Lacombe and company seek to understand the phenomenon of the skies and look for a communications break-through, their cosmic detective work reaches from the Indiana plains across the world to a remote hillside in India and then to the one place that holds the answer in an ultimate close encounter.

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: What's a couple of stay-at-home ghosts to do when their beloved home is taken over by trendy yuppies? They call on Beetlejuice, the afterlife's freelance bio-exorcist to scare off the family - and everyone gets more than she, he or it bargains for!

programme.title: Presidents Cup Official Film
programme.desc: For three decades, the US has turned this global competition into an American classic, but the International side has embraced its new identity, and is ready to rewrite the script!

programme.desc: The LPGA and PGA TOUR's best are once again teaming up in a unique mixed team invitational from Tiburon Golf Club and The Ritz-Carlton Naples, Tiburon.

programme.title: Usyk v Fury 2: Official Preview
programme.desc: Saudi Arabia plays host to one of the most anticipated rematches of all time, as Oleksandr Usyk and Tyson Fury lock horns once again on December 22. Enjoy the official preview documentary as the countdown to fight night continues.
